description_long: This is a compact, modern chaise upholstered in a muted blue fabric, featuring a gently curved backrest with subtle button tufting for added texture and visual interest. The backrest and armrests are integrated into a single, continuous form that wraps around the sides, creating a cozy and inviting seating area. The seat cushion is thick and appears well-padded, providing comfort and support, and is seamlessly fitted into the frame. The chaise stands on four slender, slightly tapered black legs that elevate the piece and give it a light, airy appearance. The overall silhouette is rounded and soft, with no sharp edges, making it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The design is minimalist yet elegant, blending functionality with contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern blue chaise with a curved, tufted backrest, integrated armrests, and slender black legs. The seat is thickly cushioned and the overall form is rounded and inviting.
description_view_0: Front view shows the curved, tufted backrest, thick seat cushion, and both armrests clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the seat and the gentle outward curve of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous curve of the backrest and the full width of the chaise.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the seat depth and the rounded armrest and backrest profile.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium height, gently curved, and features subtle button tufting for visual interest. It wraps smoothly into the armrests, creating a continuous, enveloping form.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, integrated into the curved backrest, and are of equal height and rounded shape.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slender, straight, and slightly tapered, made of black-finished metal or wood, with a minimalist, modern appearance and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid blue fabric with a smooth texture and button tufting on the backrest, giving it a subtle, classic look.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick seat cushion that is seamlessly fitted into the frame, with no loose or additional cushions visible. The backrest and armrests are padded but not separate from the main structure.
